notes.thinking-style: Dim styling is now native in 2.1.31 - no patch needed
notes.auto-memory: tengu_oboe removed in 2.1.59. Replaced by feature-flag-toggles patch.
notes.feature-flag-toggles: Enables: edit_minimalanchor_jrn. Retired: session_memory removed in 2.1.133, maple_forge_w8k in 2.1.97, sm_compact gate in 2.1.92, defer_all_bn4 in 2.1.89.
notes.prompt-slim: Updated to 2.1.59 with local-first patch resolution and built-in diagnostics
notes.tool-defer-whitelist: CLAUDE_CODE_IMMEDIATE_TOOLS env var whitelists tools past the deferral gate (including MCP tools)
notes.keyword-highlights: Extended with inline code spans, markdown formatting (**bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~), and effect-only render path
notes.code-blocks: Renders fenced code blocks in user messages with hljs syntax highlighting via the f9 ANSI component
notes.disable-bundled-skills: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLED_BUNDLED_SKILLS env var (CSV of bundled skill names) aborts bundled-skill registration at the Mz() chokepoint, removing them from both the model's skill_listing and the /slash surface. Sentinel '*' disables all bundled skills. Supersedes disable-claude-api-skill (put claude-api in the CSV). Registration-time, bundled-only, permanent.
notes.disable-skills: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLED_SKILLS env var (CSV of skill names) — session/profile filter. Filters the merged, deduped command list in the RC8 loader (Y=<flatten>([...]); helper renamed ll->Ei in 2.1.170, captured not hardcoded), hiding ANY skill (bundled/project/user/plugin) by name from both skill_listing and /slash without unregistering it. The 'Claude Code Profiles' lever for per-session skill sets.
notes.resume-cache-fix: RETIRED in 2.1.90 — Anthropic fixed natively (also added agent_listing_delta + companion_intro to allow-list)
notes.buddy-salt: RETIRED in 2.1.97 — companion system rewritten with crypto-based name generator, hardcoded salt removed.
notes.thinking-display-summarized: Opus 4.7 omits thinking text by default; this injects display:"summarized" in the request builder so reasoning comes back populated. No-op on 4.6 (already defaults to summarized).
notes.thinking-no-fold: 2.1.153 added a transcript grouper (XP4) that folds thinking blocks into adjacent tool groups, rendering them as a 'Thought for Ns' pill with ctrl+o-to-expand. This patch makes the helper flush the current group and push thinking as its own message so the inline thinking-visibility patch path renders the full reasoning.
notes.auto-color: Auto-assigns every plain session a stable random session color at startup so concurrent sessions are visually distinguishable without manually running /color. Hooks the banner CONSUMER (Mu8/useSwarmBanner), not the init path: replaces the hook's terminal `return null` — reached only by genuinely plain sessions (teammate/swarm/named-agent/--agent all return earlier) — with a banner carrying a random palette color (d3) memoized once on globalThis.__autoColorBanner. NB: patching the standaloneAgentContext constructor (UC$) does NOT work — cold launches init that context via main.tsx initialState, never through UC$, so a UC$ hook is a no-op at startup. In-memory only; resumed sessions that ran /color keep their stored color (standalone branch returns before the hook).
notes.env-block-trim: Drops three lines from the '# Environment' preamble: 'Platform' (shadowed by 'OS Version'), 'Shell: $SHELL' (misleading — Bash tool always resolves bash/zsh via ab5(), never the login shell, so fish/nu users got fish syntax against a bash executor), and the static 'Claude Code is available as a CLI ... IDE extensions' filler. Two builder sites each for platform/shell and the IDE line.
